profile.role_zh: 外语学院大三·交换生项目负责人
profile.innate_zh: 语言天赋、适应力强、跨文化敏感度高
profile.learned_zh: 多国交换经历塑造的开放心态和独立性
profile.learned_en: Openness and independence from multiple exchanges abroad
profile.belief_zh: 语言是桥梁，沟通能化解大部分冲突
profile.belief_en: Language is a bridge; communication dissolves most conflicts
profile.goal_zh: 毕业后进入国际组织工作
profile.goal_en: Work in an international organization after graduation
profile.contradiction_zh: 想留在熟悉环境 vs 渴望更大的世界
profile.contradiction_en: Wants to stay in the familiar vs. longs for a wider world
profile.deep_zh: 在不同文化间切换太久，有时不确定哪个才是真实的自己
profile.deep_en: Switched cultures so much she sometimes loses her true self
profile.fear_zh: 永远做一个表面光鲜的中间人
profile.fear_en: Being forever just a polished middle-man
profile.desire_zh: 找到真正属于自己的位置
profile.lifestyle_zh: 规律且高效，善于时间管理
profile.lifestyle_en: Regular and efficient; strong time management
profile.rhythm_zh: 上午处理事务性工作，下午深度学习，晚上社交
profile.rhythm_en: Admin in morning, deep study in afternoon, socializing at night
profile.spaces_zh: 外语楼、国际交流中心、咖啡厅、操场
profile.spaces_en: Language building, international center, cafes, track
profile.long_desire_zh: 推进下学期交换生项目的落地
profile.short_goal_zh: 回复三封来自合作院校的邮件
profile.short_goal_en: Reply to three emails from partner universities
profile.constraint_zh: 项目审批流程卡住了；同时要准备GRE
profile.constraint_en: Program approval stuck; also preparing GRE
profile.bias_zh: 倾向低估文化差异带来的实际困难
profile.narrative_zh: 把这个项目做好，就能证明我不只是会说几门语言
profile.narrative_en: Nailing this project proves I'm more than a polyglot
